state.title: State
state.description: The current state of the instance

publicIpAddress.title: Public IP Address
publicIpAddress.description: The public IPv4 address assigned to the instance

privateIpAddress.title: Private IP Address
privateIpAddress.description: The private IPv4 address of the instance

imageId.title: AMI ID
imageId.description: The ID of the Amazon Machine Image used to launch the instance

subnetId.title: Subnet ID
subnetId.description: The ID of the subnet in which the instance is running

vpcId.title: VPC ID
vpcId.description: The ID of the VPC in which the instance is running

launchTime.title: Launch Time
launchTime.description: The time the instance was launched

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: The platform of the instance (e.g., Linux/UNIX, Windows)

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: The architecture of the instance (e.g., x86_64, arm64)

keyName.title: Key Name
keyName.description: The name of the key pair used to launch the instance

availabilityZone.title: Availability Zone
availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the instance is running

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.description: The status of detailed monitoring for the instance

securityGroups.title: Security Groups
securityGroups.description: The security groups associated with the instance

arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the instance
